subject: Windows Update fails with generic error code
description: Update downloads but fails install repeatedly; error code shown in Windows Update history.

ts_steps.title: Run troubleshooter
ts_steps.action: Settings → System → Troubleshoot — Windows Update troubleshooter.

ts_steps.title: Disk cleanup
ts_steps.action: Cleanmgr — Windows Update Cleanup; restart; retry update.

ts_steps.title: DISM and SFC
ts_steps.action: Admin CMD: DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /RestoreHealth then sfc /scannow — reboot and retry.

internal_information: Corrupt component store or third-party AV locking files. WSUS may block specific KB — check with desktop engineering.
